subcodes.first_line: This is a breath from the breezes of thy Lord's grace, which We have sent unto thee, that thine eyes and the eyes of those might be gladdened thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه نفحه من نفحات عنایه ربک قد ارسلناها الیک لتقر بها عینک و عیون الذین
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution
